pattern: Fix each start index and extend the substring one character at a time, maintaining a 26-bucket frequency table so every substring's max-minus-min frequency is read off incrementally.
hints: Beauty depends only on the largest and smallest non-zero character frequencies in a substring.
There are O(n^2) substrings; recomputing frequencies from scratch for each is too slow.
For each start, grow the substring rightward, updating a frequency array of size 26 and summing (max - min over non-zero counts) at every step.

edge_inputs.description: all identical characters give zero beauty everywhere

stress.description: random lowercase string up to max length
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    n = rng.randrange(1, max(2, size) + 1)
    alpha = string.ascii_lowercase[:rng.randrange(1, 6)]
    s = ''.join(rng.choice(alpha) for _ in range(n))
    return [s]
